title: [webcomponentwidgets]
text: [webcomponentwidgets] The [webcomponentwidgets] section of the initialization file contains logical widget definitions for components used in Dynamic Server Page (DSP) components. LogicalWidgetName = PhysicalWidgetName { ( WidgetProperty1 = Value1 ; WidgetProperty2 = Value2 ; ... ) } Description Each logical widget maps to a physical widget, and optionally sets some of its properties. The property values defined in this section override the hard-coded defaults of the physical widget. The maximum length of the widget property string is 1024 characters. You can use this section to define your own logical widgets for components. [webcomponentwidgets] ; Logical to physical mapping of component widget for DSPs custom-component=customComponent Copy Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
